home.title: NTI Workflow
home.intro: Interní nástroje pro konfiguraci Vault a analýzu životního cyklu.

workflowViewer.title: Workflow Viewer
workflowViewer.description: Nahrajte výstup Excel z NTI Vault Dump Config a vizualizujte přechody životního cyklu, role a oprávnění stavů.

lifecycleCompare.title: Lifecycle Compare
lifecycleCompare.description: Porovnejte dva exporty životního cyklu Vault a najděte rozdíly.

vaultConfigViewer.title: NTI for Vault Config
vaultConfigViewer.description: Procházejte kontejnery, procesory, úlohy a nastavení v JSON konfiguraci NTI for Vault Job.

upload.dropSubtitle: nebo klikněte pro výběr výstupního souboru Excel z
upload.optionalSheetSuffix: existuje, lze zobrazit také state permissions.
upload.ariaLabel: Nahrát výstupní soubor Excel z NTI Vault Dump Config

status.chooseOrDrop: Choose or drag the Excel output file from NTI Vault Dump Config.

error.emptyFile: The file is empty. Choose a valid Vault Excel export.
error.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum file size is 25 MB.
error.oneFileOnly: Choose or drag one Excel file at a time.
error.failed: Upload failed. Check that the file is a valid Vault Excel export.
error.requiredSheetMissing: The Excel file is missing the LifeCycleDefinitionTransitions sheet.
error.parseFailed: The file could not be parsed.

viewer.title: Workflow Viewer
viewer.permissionsIntro: State permissions can be shown for the selected role.

details.placeholder: Click a state, transition, or job marker to view details.

table.permissionsNote: This section shows all roles and all four permission types for the selected LifeCycleDefinition.

summary.largeLifecycleHint: Large lifecycle: Starting with "To/from selected state" for a better overview. Select "All transitions" for the complete graph.

vault.dropTitle: Přetáhněte sem soubor JSON NTI for Vault Job
vault.dropSubtitle: nebo klikněte pro výběr konfiguračního souboru
vault.topFilepaths: File paths to exclude during job clean up
vault.statusReady: Ready - load a config file to begin.
vault.errorEmptyArray: The configuration file contains an empty array.
vault.errorInvalidFormat: The JSON could be read, but the configuration format is invalid.
vault.errorMissingContainers: The JSON could be read, but does not contain JobProcessor.JobProcessorContainers.
vault.ariaLabel: Nahrát konfigurační soubor JSON NTI for Vault Job
vault.tableRunOnlyViaJobProcessorKey: Run only via job processor key
vault.emptyChooseJobProcessor: Choose a jobprocessor to see details.
vault.uploadIntro: Vyberte nebo přetáhněte konfigurační soubor JSON NTI for Vault Job.
